title: glosocomia ovata
intro: Glosocomia ovata is a plant species, also known as the yellow bird's eye or yellow bird eye, that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The medicinal properties of Glosocomia ovata include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are derived from its essential oil. The health benefits of using Glosocomia ovata include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as its use as a natural remedy for colds and respiratory infections. Glosocomia ovata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
